description_long: This is an adult human figure with a medium build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides. The individual is dressed in a short-sleeved, fitted t-shirt and a pair of mid-thigh shorts, both of which appear casual and suitable for warm weather. The figure is barefoot, with toes and feet clearly visible, and the legs are proportionate to the torso. The head features a neatly styled ponytail, and the facial features are neutral and realistic. The overall appearance suggests a casual pedestrian, likely encountered in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or residential areas. The surface of the figure is smooth and matte, with realistic anatomical proportions and subtle muscle definition.
description: A casually dressed adult standing upright with arms outstretched, wearing a t-shirt, shorts, and barefoot, with hair tied in a ponytail. The figure has realistic proportions and a smooth, matte surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, chest, and full front of the t-shirt and shorts, with arms extended and feet visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the ponytail, and the side contour of the torso and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head with the ponytail, the back of the t-shirt and shorts, and both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, the ponytail, and the side outline of the body and legs.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved t-shirt and mid-thigh shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long hair tied in a ponytail
